极速快3两期必中【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239142253_64295356<br>vk.com/topic-239142255_64036548<br>vk.com/topic-239142236_64452255<br>vk.com/topic-239142232_64738551<br>vk.com/topic-239142234_64124106<br>vk.com/topic-239142208_64625239<br>vk.com/topic-239142241_65777230<br>vk.com/topic-239142264_64124129<br>vk.com/topic-239142263_64295376<br>vk.com/topic-239142259_64900764<br>vk.com/topic-239142186_64452285<br>vk.com/topic-239142212_64738595<br>vk.com/topic-239142231_65777247<br>vk.com/topic-239142225_64036623<br>vk.com/topic-239100494_64124193<br>vk.com/topic-239110199_64900778<br>vk.com/topic-239142246_64452343<br>vk.com/topic-239142266_64452347<br>vk.com/topic-239058785_64036663<br>vk.com/topic-239142249_64900849<br>vk.com/topic-239142204_64124245<br>vk.com/topic-239142209_64900862<br>vk.com/topic-239142190_65186234<br>vk.com/topic-239142224_64124269<br>vk.com/topic-239142195_64036700<br>vk.com/topic-239142192_64738747<br>vk.com/topic-239095572_64738744<br>vk.com/topic-239142183_64295499<br>vk.com/topic-239142222_64738749<br>vk.com/topic-239142197_65565166<br>vk.com/topic-239142215_64036706<br>vk.com/topic-239142203_64295501<br>vk.com/topic-239142189_64900896<br>vk.com/topi
